member.name: T:pcHwMon_server.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:pcHwMon_server.My.Resources.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:pcHwMon_server.My.Resources.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: T:pcHwMon_server.My.Resources.Resource1
member.summary: Classe di risorse fortemente tipizzata per la ricerca di stringhe localizzate e così via.

member.name: P:pcHwMon_server.My.Resources.Resource1.ResourceManager
member.summary: Restituisce l'istanza di ResourceManager nella cache utilizzata da questa classe.

member.name: P:pcHwMon_server.My.Resources.Resource1.Culture
member.summary: Esegue l'override della proprietà CurrentUICulture del thread corrente per tutte le ricerche di risorse eseguite utilizzando questa classe di risorse fortemente tipizzata.

member.name: P:pcHwMon_server.My.Resources.Resource1.String1
member.summary: Cerca una stringa localizzata simile a <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?> <Task version="1.4" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/windows/2004/02/mit/task"> <RegistrationInfo> <Date>2020-04-23T22:04:12.0813748</Date> <Author>.

member.name: P:pcHwMon_server.My.Resources.Resource1.String2
member.summary: Cerca una stringa localizzata simile a </Author> <URI>\PcHwMon_server</URI> </RegistrationInfo> <Triggers /> <Principals> <Principal id="Author"> <UserId>.

member.name: P:pcHwMon_server.My.Resources.Resource1.String3
member.summary: Cerca una stringa localizzata simile a </UserId> <LogonType>InteractiveToken</LogonType> <RunLevel>HighestAvailable</RunLevel> </Principal> </Principals> <Settings> <MultipleInstancesPolicy>IgnoreNew</MultipleInstancesPolicy> <DisallowStartIfOnBatteries>false</DisallowStartIfOnBatteries> <StopIfGoingOnBatteries>true</StopIfGoingOnBatteries> <AllowHardTerminate>true</AllowHardTerminate> <StartWhenAvailable>false</StartWhenAvailable> <RunOnlyIfNetworkAvailable>false</RunOnlyIfNetworkAvailable> [stringa troncata]";.

member.name: P:pcHwMon_server.My.Resources.Resource1.String4
member.summary: Cerca una stringa localizzata simile a </Command> </Exec> </Actions> </Task>.
